description: API latency percentiles · ORB filter rejection breakdown · Breakout-type win rates · Kraken WS health · HMM regime state

links.title: ORB CNN Trading
links.tooltip: Go to ORB CNN Paper Trading dashboard

panels.title: Overall API Latency — p50 / p95 / p99
ORB Filter Gate — Passed vs Rejected vs Error

panels.description: Total detection count per breakout direction over the selected time window. CNN signals are classified at detection time before the filter gate.
panels.title: Detections by Direction (24h)

panels.description: CNN verdict breakdown: signal (above threshold) vs no_signal vs skipped (no model loaded).
panels.title: CNN Verdict Distribution (24h)

panels.description: Distribution of CNN P(good) probability scores across all scored breakouts. A healthy model should show a bimodal distribution with peaks near 0.2 and 0.8.
panels.title: CNN P(good) Score Distribution

panels.description: Rate of ORB, PDR, IB, and Consolidation breakout signals over time. Note: all types share the orb_detections_total counter — type breakdown requires the Postgres audit trail query (see journal API).
panels.title: Breakout Detections Over Time (by Direction)
Kraken WS Connection State Over Time

panels.description: Current HMM regime state per symbol: 1=Trending (green), 2=Volatile (yellow), 3=Choppy (red). Confident regimes (above threshold) show brighter colours.
panels.title: Current Regime State per Symbol

panels.description: HMM regime detection confidence (0–100%) per symbol. Values below the 60% confidence threshold trigger the conservative position multiplier regardless of the detected state.
panels.title: Regime Confidence per Symbol

panels.description: Position sizing multiplier derived from the HMM regime: Trending=1.0×, Volatile=0.5×, Choppy=0.25×. Low confidence forces 0.25× regardless.
panels.title: Position Sizing Multiplier per Symbol

panels.description: Regime state timeline — state-timeline panel shows how each symbol's regime has evolved over the selected time window.
panels.title: Regime State Timeline (all symbols)

title: Trading Analytics — Latency · Filters · Regime · Kraken
